scripts.db:migrate: echo "Use 'yarn sb:reset' (fresh) or 'yarn sb:apply' (incremental) for local Supabase. drizzle-kit migrate is not used with supabase migrations." && exit 1
scripts.seed-master-data: yarn tsx seeds/seed-industry-categories-and-industries.ts && yarn tsx seeds/seed-listing-types.ts && yarn tsx seeds/seed-position-levels.ts
scripts.seed-sample-tenants: echo "seed-sample-tenants is removed (tenants/users schema deleted)" && exit 1
